title: Status S15 221mm 4 Watt Warm White LED Opal Strip Light Bulb
features: STRIP LIGHT LED LIGHT BULB: This Status LED Strip Light Bulb is an ideal replacement bulb suitable for use in kitchen fittings, under cabinet lighting, bathroom units, shaver lights and picture lights amongst others. Measuring 221mm long and 26mm wide, it's a great choice where soft light and minimal glare is needed

ECONOMICAL & ENERGY SAVING: Only using 4 watts to produce 340 lumens of light, this modern LED Bulb is equivalent to 31 watts but uses up to 90% less energy reducing your electricity usage. The LED bulb also has a much longer lifespan than its predecessors making it highly cost-effective
WARM WHITE COLOUR: Ideal for living spaces, bedrooms and relaxation areas, the bulb emits a 3000K warm white soft, yellow-toned glow that resembles traditional incandescent light bulbs
SCC-S15 FITTING: This LED Double Ended Tubular (DET) Light Bulb has a SCC-S15 single pin 15mm wide fitting at both ends, and simply pushes into the light fitting with minimal effort required

LONG-LIFE: Compared to old incandescent or halogen bulbs, this modern LED bulb has a long average lifespan of 25,000 hours so it requires changing less often. The bulb is also rated for 12,500 switch cycles, making it ideal for use in rooms such as bathrooms where it is switched on and off frequently
description: Providing 340 lumens of warm white light instantly at the flick of a switch, this Status 4 Watt LED Opal Strip Light Bulb is suitable for use in kitchen fittings, under cabinet lighting, bathroom units and shaver lights, and is also commonly found in bathroom mirror and picture lights. Double-ended and measuring 221mm from end to end, the economical tube has a 26mm diameter with 15mm wide S15 caps. Also known as a SCC-S15 or Double Ended Tubular (DET) bulb, the non-dimmable tube light is fitted with an internal opal diffuser that produces a softer light with minimal glare. An ideal replacement for no longer produced incandescent tube lights, this LED strip light, while more expensive to purchase, consumes up to 85% less energy and represents a genuine saving in energy costs. It also has a much longer life too, and is rated for 25,000 hours or 12,500 switch cycles.
